project_type: Python script generating Excel xlsx files from PDF data
test_framework: None - manual verification by running the script
test_command: python3 generate_excel.py && python3 -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile('Kalkulator_Premi_MiUHC.xlsx'); print(z.namelist()); z.close()"
verification_instructions: Run generate_excel.py and verify the output xlsx has correct structure (4 sheets, proper data, working formulas)
setup_instructions: No setup needed - Python standard library only
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - no external packages can be installed. Must use only Python standard library (zipfile, zlib, re, os). No openpyxl, xlsxwriter, or any third-party library.
key_patterns: The existing generate_excel.py uses a custom XlsxWriter class that builds xlsx from raw XML + zipfile. The reference file kalkulator_MIUHC.xlsx contains the exact XML structure to replicate. PDF data is extracted using zlib decompression of FlateDecode streams + regex.
relevant_files: B. Tabel Premi Syariah 2024 - Miuhc Versi Quick PDF (3).pdf
B. Tabel Premi Miuhc Versi Quick PDF Per Sep 2025 (3).pdf
directory_structure: All files in /projects/sandbox/kirodev/ - flat structure with PDFs, xlsx reference, and Python script
